title: Revolve
description: Bring Minecraft’s Sun and Moon to Life!
body:
Join the Discord to Talk About the Mod!

Tired of a static sun and moon? Revolve brings subtle life to Minecraft’s skies by reimagining the sun and moon while staying true to the game’s iconic style!

**Fully 3D Sun & Moon:** The sun and moon are no longer flat textures. They are fully 3D, adding real depth and presence when you look up at the sky. **Smooth Rotational Animation:** As time passes, the sun and moon gently rotate, making the day and night cycle feel more dynamic and immersive without being distracting. **Shader Compatible & Vanilla Friendly:** Built to work seamlessly with shaders, Revolve enhances the sky without clashing with other visual mods. It keeps everything clean, simple, and true to vanilla Minecraft.

The sky’s the limit! Expect even more improvements in future updates!
